name: Pagination
description: A pagination component for navigating through large datasets with page numbers, previous/next buttons, and optional total count display.
usage_guidelines: Use for navigating through paginated data (tables, lists, grids).
Set total to the total number of items in dataset.
Set pageSize to control items per page.
Use currentPage for controlled pagination state.
Handle onChange to update data display when page changes.
Enable displayTotal to show total item count.

total.description: Total number of items in dataset.

styling_info.visual_description: A horizontal row of page numbers with previous/next buttons. Active page is highlighted with primary color. Disabled buttons have reduced opacity. Includes hover effects on interactive elements.

Do: Calculate total pages correctly from total items and pageSize
Handle onChange to fetch/display appropriate data
Dont: Don't forget to update currentPage in onChange
Don't use for very small datasets (< 20 items)
Don't set pageSize too large (impacts performance)
Don't forget to handle edge cases (empty data)
